## Summary

- Added 5 new `it()` blocks to the `processCTAs` describe block in `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js`:
  1. `plans-education` variant filters trial CTAs (free-trial ID)
  2. `plans-students` variant filters trial CTAs (free-trial ID)
  3. `start-free-trial` analytics ID is filtered on `plans` variant
  4. `fourteen-day-trial` analytics ID is filtered on `plans` variant
  5. `thirty-day-trial` analytics ID is filtered on `plans` variant

All five new tests pass alongside all 59 existing tests (64 total, 0 failures).

**Files changed:** `web-components/test/hydrate.test.js` — 1 file, +50 lines
